title: Citrusy Crisp Rice Canadian Pilaf
description: A meal-prep friendly, citrusy and crisp rice dish featuring rice wine, deglazed with added aromatics for a delicious, low-carb meal.

ingredients.name: 4 cups short grain rice
ingredients.notes: preferably glutinous or sushi-grade for a sticky texture

instructions: Rinse the rice in cold water until the water runs clear.
In a medium saucepan, combine the rinsed rice and water. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for about 15 minutes or until liquid is absorbed.

While the rice cooks, bring rice wine and lemon juice to a boil in a small saucepan over medium-high heat. Add minced garlic and cook for an additional minute to deglaze the pan, scraping up any browned bits.
Once cooked, mix the rice with its cooking water (about 1/2 cup) into the deglazed wine mixture.
In another large skillet, melt butter over medium-high heat. Add rice, salt, and remaining lemon juice to the skillet. Cook for about 5 minutes until the rice is crisp but not burnt.
Serve warm or at room temperature as a side dish.
